inputs.label: Total Raw Material
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of raw material to be processed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of raw material to be processed.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale de matière première à traiter.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de materia prima a procesar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الإجمالية للمواد الخام المراد معالجتها.

inputs.label: Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of target substance in raw material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of target substance in raw material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la substance cible dans la matière première.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la sustancia objetivo en la materia prima.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المادة المستهدفة في المادة الخام.

inputs.label: Recovery Rate
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of extraction process in recovering the target substance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of extraction process in recovering the target substance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekstraksiyon prosesinin hedef maddeyi geri kazanma verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effizienz des Extraktionsprozesses bei der Rückgewinnung der Zielsubstanz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité du processus d'extraction pour récupérer la substance cible.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del proceso de extracción para recuperar la sustancia objetivo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة عملية الاستخلاص في استرداد المادة المستهدفة.

inputs.label: Target Purity
inputs.businessContext: Desired purity of the final extracted product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired purity of the final extracted product.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai ekstrakte edilen ürünün istenen saflığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Reinheit des endgültigen extrahierten Produkts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pureté souhaitée du produit final extrait.
businessContext_i18n.es: Pureza deseada del producto extraído final.

formulas.breakdown3: "Final pure product: " + (totalMaterial * concentration / 100 * recoveryRate / 100 * targetPurity / 100) + " kg"

breakdown: "Final pure product: " + (totalMaterial * concentration / 100 * recoveryRate / 100 * targetPurity / 100) + " kg"
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
